title: cleisostoma odoratum subsp. sabahense
intro: Cleisostoma odoratum subsp. sabahense is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma odoratum subsp. sabahense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
